## Summary

- What changed?
- Why?

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] chore
- [ ] docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased`
- [ ] migrations checked (if DB impacted)
- [ ] local tests/build pass
- [ ] no secret committed

## Release impact

- SemVer target:
  - [ ] patch
  - [ ] minor
  - [ ] major
- Tag planned (if release PR): `vX.Y.Z`
